title: Magna Carta
description: A Wikisource source card for Magna Carta and the history of law and rights.

pages.text: Magna Carta is a medieval legal document often used to study limits on power, rule of law, legal rights, and later constitutional traditions.
Use this source in short excerpts with background support, vocabulary scaffolds, and comparisons to later rights documents.
The historical text is public domain. Check the Wikisource page for translation, edition, and source notes before assigning or mirroring excerpts.
